reason: Starting with a standard binary cross-entropy loss function is often a good baseline. SpecAugment can help improve model robustness by introducing randomness into the training data. A slightly lower learning rate of 5e-4 may provide better generalization compared to the default 1e-3. AdamW, which includes weight decay, can sometimes lead to better performance on multi-label classification tasks. Cosine decay scheduling allows the learning rate to smoothly decrease throughout training, potentially leading to more stable convergence.
